articles.title: Former Liberal MP to face child sex trial
articles.description: Former Liberal MP Rory Amon will face a NSW Supreme Court trial later this year on allegations he sexually assaulted a 13-year-old boy in 2017.

articles.title: Hundreds of Queensland Rail services to be halted amid pay dispute
articles.description: Queensland commuters can expect more delays from Tuesday when a Saturday service will start due to industrial action.

articles.title: 1 dead in downtown Hamilton shooting, police say
articles.description: One person has died in hospital after a shooting in downtown Hamilton on Thursday, police say.

articles.title: Male dead after downtown Hamilton shooting, police say
articles.description: A male has died in hospital after a shooting in downtown Hamilton on Thursday, police say.

articles.title: MLA for Old Fort says province should consider buying homes impacted by multiple landslides
articles.description: The B.C. member of the legislature representing Old Fort, the community where a landslide has forced people from their homes, says he'll be meeting with constituents to discuss options for the future, including asking the province to buy their properties.

articles.description: Video shows shooting suspect running through security

articles.title: WATCH: Allison Feldman's father dies, weeks after murder verdict
articles.description: Earlier this month, a jury convicted Ian Mitcham of murdering Allison back in 2015. Harley was in court nearly every day while the guilt phase of the trial played out.

articles.title: Western Mass. residents receive ‘hateful and racist’ letter from mysterious group
articles.description: Police are investigating “hateful and racist” letters from a mysterious group that were left on at least seven vehicles in Western Massachusetts on Wednesday.

articles.title: Fentanyl hidden in toys, cereal box in federal drug bust, prosecutors say
articles.description: Investigators seized about 56 pounds of fentanyl, 116 pounds of methamphetamine, more than $300,000 in cash and 20 guns, according to a federal affidavit.

articles.title: Former MP Rory Amon to face retrial over child rape and assault charge
articles.description: Amon is accused of sexual intercourse without consent and indecent assault of a 13-year-old boy on Sydney’s northern beaches.

articles.title: Man charged with attempted murder after paramedic stabbed in face and neck

articles.description: Toronto police are investigating after a collision between a light-rail transit vehicle and a passenger vehicle Thursday afternoon, causing delays on Line 6 Finch West.

articles.title: Outbreak of centuries-old bacterial disease plagues Pasadena school

articles.title: Porter Airlines launching service from Ottawa to Aruba, Jamaica
articles.description: Ottawa travellers will be able to escape the cold weather to Aruba, Jamaica and Los Cabos, Mexico next winter.

articles.description: After years of construction and a costly renovation, county officials held a ribbon-cutting ceremony for the Magothy Bridge Road Bridge.

articles.description: Lakelands Public Health warns that the suspected opioid circulating in Haliburton County may be contaminated with other substances.

articles.title: Newly released images show correspondents' dinner suspect just prior to attack
articles.description: New images show Cole Allen, the suspect in the White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting, heavily armed minutes before allegedly storming the event on Saturday. It comes as more questions are raised about security. Matt Gutman reports.

articles.title: Coroner delivers findings on five fatal shootings involving British Army
articles.description: Soldiers did not use reasonable force when five people were killed in Belfast in shootings involving the British Army in 1972, a coroner has ruled.

articles.title: Under-fire UK boosts security for Jews after deadly attack
articles.description: LONDON - The UK government on Thursday announced an extra £25 million ($33 million) for security outside synagogues and schools, a day after two Jews were stabbed in the latest attack on the community.

articles.title: Veteran has to take 30 painkillers a day after falling ill in Afghanistan

articles.description: A forensic tent has been set up and a section of road has been cordoned off in Manchester this morning with police officers and paramedics pictured working at the scene

articles.title: Mum of ‘gentle soul’ stabbed in Golders Green attack reveals call no parent wants to receive
articles.description: The mother of Golders Green stab victim Shloime Rand today described how the ‘gentle soul’ was still in hospital recovering from a wound to the chest.
